parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(
  jsonb_agg(row_to_json(turns) ORDER BY turns.created_at),
  '[]'::jsonb
) AS session_turns
FROM (
  SELECT role, message_text, project_slug, created_at, metadata_json
  FROM (
    SELECT role, message_text, project_slug, created_at, metadata_json
    FROM openbrain_chat_turns
    WHERE session_id = $1::text
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
    LIMIT 6
  ) recent
  ORDER BY created_at ASC
) turns;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nomic-embed-text', input: $('Normalize Assistant Request').first().json.query, truncate: true }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const withStage = (trace, stage, status, extra = {}) => {
  const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
  const errorCode = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(extra, 'error_code') ? extra.error_code : (trace?.error_code ?? null);
  const errorMessage = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(extra, 'error_message') ? extra.error_message : (trace?.error_message ?? null);
  return {
    ...(trace || {}),
    ...extra,
    stage,
    status,
    error_code: errorCode,
    error_message: errorMessage,
    timestamp,
    stage_history: [
      ...((trace && Array.isArray(trace.stage_history)) ? trace.stage_history : []),
      { stage, status, timestamp, error_code: errorCode, error_message: errorMessage },
    ],
  };
};
const grounding = {
  status: 'none',
  weak_grounding: true,
  note: 'Grounding is unavailable because the embedding step failed before retrieval.',
  reasons: ['embedding_failed'],
  supporting_source_count: 0,
  reviewed_source_count: 0,
  strongest_similarity: null,
  similarity_threshold: 0.72,
  ranking_mode: null,
  evidence_strength: 'none',
  overall_trust_band: 'low',
  primary_memory_ids: [],
  primary_chunk_indexes: [],
};
return [{
  json: {
    ok: false,
    error: $json.error,
    query: $json.query,
    session_id: $json.session_id,
    project_slug: $json.project_slug ?? null,
    top_k: $json.top_k,
    retrieval: {
      strategy: $json.retrieval_strategy,
      project_match_count: 0,
      general_match_count: 0,
      lexical_project_match_count: 0,
      lexical_general_match_count: 0,
      lexical_all_match_count: 0,
      memory_count: 0,
      strongest_similarity: null,
      similarity_threshold: 0.72,
      empty: true,
    },
    trust: {
      overall_band: 'low',
      evidence_strength: 'none',
      reviewed_source_count: 0,
      unreviewed_source_count: 0,
      scope_match_count: 0,
      high_trust_source_count: 0,
      medium_trust_source_count: 0,
      low_trust_source_count: 0,
      uncertainty_indicator: true,
      uncertainty_reasons: ['embedding_failed'],
    },
    grounding,
    sources: [],
    selected_sources: [],
    retrieved_candidates: [],
    answer_mode: 'insufficient',
    conflict_flag: false,
    conflict_severity: null,
    conflict_details: [],
    claim_support_counts: [],
    most_supported_claim: null,
    most_recent_claim: null,
    entity_focus: null,
    filtered_candidate_count: 0,
    context_preview: '',
    session: {
      turn_count_before: Array.isArray($json.session_turns) ? $json.session_turns.length : 0,
      history_used: Array.isArray($json.session_turns) ? $json.session_turns.length > 0 : false,
      stored: false,
    },
    trace: withStage($json.trace, 'response_ready', 'failed', {
      error_code: $json.error?.code ?? 'OLLAMA_EMBEDDING_FAILED',
      error_message: $json.error?.message ?? 'Ollama embedding request failed',
      grounding_status: grounding.status,
      weak_grounding: grounding.weak_grounding,
      answer_mode: 'insufficient',
      conflict_flag: false,
    }),
  },
}];

parameters.query:
WITH lexical_terms AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT lower(value) AS term
  FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE($4::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)) AS value
  WHERE btrim(value) <> ''
),
strong_terms AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT lower(value) AS term
  FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE($5::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)) AS value
  WHERE btrim(value) <> ''
)
SELECT
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(project_rows) ORDER BY project_rows.review_priority, project_rows.distance, project_rows.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, project_rows.id DESC)
    FROM (
      SELECT id, created_at, title, source, category, content, metadata_json,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), NULL) AS project_slug,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') AS review_status,
        CASE COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed')
          WHEN 'reviewed' THEN 0
          WHEN 'unreviewed' THEN 1
          WHEN 'suspect' THEN 2
          ELSE 3
        END AS review_priority,
        ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 6) AS similarity,
        (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS distance
      FROM memories
      WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
        AND COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') <> 'suppressed'
        AND $2::text IS NOT NULL
        AND NULLIF(COALESCE(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), '') = $2::text
      ORDER BY review_priority ASC, distance ASC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
      LIMIT $3::int
    ) project_rows
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS project_memories,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(general_rows) ORDER BY general_rows.review_priority, general_rows.distance, general_rows.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, general_rows.id DESC)
    FROM (
      SELECT id, created_at, title, source, category, content, metadata_json,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), NULL) AS project_slug,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') AS review_status,
        CASE COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed')
          WHEN 'reviewed' THEN 0
          WHEN 'unreviewed' THEN 1
          WHEN 'suspect' THEN 2
          ELSE 3
        END AS review_priority,
        ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 6) AS similarity,
        (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS distance
      FROM memories
      WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
        AND COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') <> 'suppressed'
        AND COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), '') = ''
      ORDER BY review_priority ASC, distance ASC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
      LIMIT $3::int
    ) general_rows
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS general_memories,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(all_rows) ORDER BY all_rows.review_priority, all_rows.distance, all_rows.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, all_rows.id DESC)
    FROM (
      SELECT id, created_at, title, source, category, content, metadata_json,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), NULL) AS project_slug,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') AS review_status,
        CASE COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed')
          WHEN 'reviewed' THEN 0
          WHEN 'unreviewed' THEN 1
          WHEN 'suspect' THEN 2
          ELSE 3
        END AS review_priority,
        ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 6) AS similarity,
        (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS distance
      FROM memories
      WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
        AND COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') <> 'suppressed'
      ORDER BY review_priority ASC, distance ASC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
      LIMIT $3::int
    ) all_rows
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS all_memories,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(project_lex_rows) ORDER BY project_lex_rows.strong_token_hits DESC, project_lex_rows.title_lexical_hits DESC, project_lex_rows.lexical_overlap DESC, project_lex_rows.review_priority ASC, project_lex_rows.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, project_lex_rows.id DESC)
    FROM (
      SELECT *
      FROM (
        SELECT id, created_at, title, source, category, content, metadata_json,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), NULL) AS project_slug,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') AS review_status,
          CASE COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed')
            WHEN 'reviewed' THEN 0
            WHEN 'unreviewed' THEN 1
            WHEN 'suspect' THEN 2
            ELSE 3
          END AS review_priority,
          CASE WHEN embedding IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 6) ELSE NULL END AS similarity,
          CASE WHEN embedding IS NOT NULL THEN (embedding <=> $1::vector) ELSE NULL END AS distance,
          (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lexical_terms lt WHERE searchable.haystack LIKE '%' || lt.term || '%') AS lexical_overlap,
          (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lexical_terms lt WHERE searchable.title_haystack LIKE '%' || lt.term || '%') AS title_lexical_hits,
          (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strong_terms st WHERE searchable.haystack LIKE '%' || st.term || '%') AS strong_token_hits,
          true AS lexical_match
        FROM memories
        CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
          SELECT lower(concat_ws(E'\n', COALESCE(title, ''), COALESCE(content, ''), COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filename', ''), COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filepath', ''))) AS haystack,
            lower(concat_ws(E'\n', COALESCE(title, ''), COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filename', ''))) AS title_haystack
        ) searchable
        WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') <> 'suppressed'
          AND $2::text IS NOT NULL
          AND NULLIF(COALESCE(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), '') = $2::text
      ) project_lex_seed
      WHERE project_lex_seed.lexical_overlap > 0 OR project_lex_seed.strong_token_hits > 0
      ORDER BY project_lex_seed.strong_token_hits DESC, project_lex_seed.title_lexical_hits DESC, project_lex_seed.lexical_overlap DESC, project_lex_seed.review_priority ASC, project_lex_seed.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, project_lex_seed.id DESC
      LIMIT $6::int
    ) project_lex_rows
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS lexical_project_memories,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(general_lex_rows) ORDER BY general_lex_rows.strong_token_hits DESC, general_lex_rows.title_lexical_hits DESC, general_lex_rows.lexical_overlap DESC, general_lex_rows.review_priority ASC, general_lex_rows.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, general_lex_rows.id DESC)
    FROM (
      SELECT *
      FROM (
        SELECT id, created_at, title, source, category, content, metadata_json,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), NULL) AS project_slug,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') AS review_status,
          CASE COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed')
            WHEN 'reviewed' THEN 0
            WHEN 'unreviewed' THEN 1
            WHEN 'suspect' THEN 2
            ELSE 3
          END AS review_priority,
          CASE WHEN embedding IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 6) ELSE NULL END AS similarity,
          CASE WHEN embedding IS NOT NULL THEN (embedding <=> $1::vector) ELSE NULL END AS distance,
          (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lexical_terms lt WHERE searchable.haystack LIKE '%' || lt.term || '%') AS lexical_overlap,
          (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lexical_terms lt WHERE searchable.title_haystack LIKE '%' || lt.term || '%') AS title_lexical_hits,
          (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strong_terms st WHERE searchable.haystack LIKE '%' || st.term || '%') AS strong_token_hits,
          true AS lexical_match
        FROM memories
        CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
          SELECT lower(concat_ws(E'\n', COALESCE(title, ''), COALESCE(content, ''), COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filename', ''), COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filepath', ''))) AS haystack,
            lower(concat_ws(E'\n', COALESCE(title, ''), COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filename', ''))) AS title_haystack
        ) searchable
        WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') <> 'suppressed'
          AND COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), '') = ''
      ) general_lex_seed
      WHERE general_lex_seed.lexical_overlap > 0 OR general_lex_seed.strong_token_hits > 0
      ORDER BY general_lex_seed.strong_token_hits DESC, general_lex_seed.title_lexical_hits DESC, general_lex_seed.lexical_overlap DESC, general_lex_seed.review_priority ASC, general_lex_seed.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, general_lex_seed.id DESC
      LIMIT $6::int
    ) general_lex_rows
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS lexical_general_memories,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(all_lex_rows) ORDER BY all_lex_rows.strong_token_hits DESC, all_lex_rows.title_lexical_hits DESC, all_lex_rows.lexical_overlap DESC, all_lex_rows.review_priority ASC, all_lex_rows.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, all_lex_rows.id DESC)
    FROM (
      SELECT *
      FROM (
        SELECT id, created_at, title, source, category, content, metadata_json,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), NULL) AS project_slug,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') AS review_status,
          CASE COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed')
            WHEN 'reviewed' THEN 0
            WHEN 'unreviewed' THEN 1
            WHEN 'suspect' THEN 2
            ELSE 3
          END AS review_priority,
          CASE WHEN embedding IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 6) ELSE NULL END AS similarity,
          CASE WHEN embedding IS NOT NULL THEN (embedding <=> $1::vector) ELSE NULL END AS distance,
          (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lexical_terms lt WHERE searchable.haystack LIKE '%' || lt.term || '%') AS lexical_overlap,
          (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lexical_terms lt WHERE searchable.title_haystack LIKE '%' || lt.term || '%') AS title_lexical_hits,
          (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strong_terms st WHERE searchable.haystack LIKE '%' || st.term || '%') AS strong_token_hits,
          true AS lexical_match
        FROM memories
        CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
          SELECT lower(concat_ws(E'\n', COALESCE(title, ''), COALESCE(content, ''), COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filename', ''), COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filepath', ''))) AS haystack,
            lower(concat_ws(E'\n', COALESCE(title, ''), COALESCE(metadata_json->>'filename', ''))) AS title_haystack
        ) searchable
        WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'review_status', ''), 'unreviewed') <> 'suppressed'
      ) all_lex_seed
      WHERE all_lex_seed.lexical_overlap > 0 OR all_lex_seed.strong_token_hits > 0
      ORDER BY all_lex_seed.strong_token_hits DESC, all_lex_seed.title_lexical_hits DESC, all_lex_seed.lexical_overlap DESC, all_lex_seed.review_priority ASC, all_lex_seed.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, all_lex_seed.id DESC
      LIMIT $6::int
    ) all_lex_rows
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS lexical_all_memories;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3', prompt: $json.prompt, stream: false, options: { temperature: 0, seed: 0 } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const withStage = (trace, stage, status, extra = {}) => {
  const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
  const errorCode = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(extra, 'error_code') ? extra.error_code : (trace.error_code ?? null);
  const errorMessage = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(extra, 'error_message') ? extra.error_message : (trace.error_message ?? null);
  return {
    ...trace,
    ...extra,
    stage,
    status,
    error_code: errorCode,
    error_message: errorMessage,
    timestamp,
    stage_history: [
      ...(Array.isArray(trace.stage_history) ? trace.stage_history : []),
      { stage, status, timestamp, error_code: errorCode, error_message: errorMessage },
    ],
  };
};
const grounding = {
  status: 'none',
  weak_grounding: true,
  note: 'No strong supporting memory was retrieved.',
  reasons: ['no_retrieved_memory'],
  supporting_source_count: 0,
  reviewed_source_count: 0,
  strongest_similarity: $json.strongest_similarity ?? null,
  similarity_threshold: $json.similarity_threshold,
  ranking_mode: $json.trace?.ranking_mode ?? null,
  evidence_strength: 'none',
  overall_trust_band: 'low',
  primary_memory_ids: [],
  primary_chunk_indexes: [],
};
return [{
  json: {
    ok: true,
    answer: 'I do not have enough stored memory to answer that yet. No strong supporting memory was retrieved.',
    query: $json.query,
    session_id: $json.session_id,
    project_slug: $json.project_slug ?? null,
    top_k: $json.top_k,
    retrieval: {
      strategy: $json.retrieval_strategy,
      project_match_count: $json.project_match_count,
      general_match_count: $json.general_match_count,
      lexical_project_match_count: $json.lexical_project_match_count ?? 0,
      lexical_general_match_count: $json.lexical_general_match_count ?? 0,
      lexical_all_match_count: $json.lexical_all_match_count ?? 0,
      usable_memory_count: $json.usable_memory_count,
      suspect_memory_count: $json.suspect_memory_count,
      memory_count: 0,
      strongest_similarity: $json.strongest_similarity,
      similarity_threshold: $json.similarity_threshold,
      empty: true,
    },
    trust: {
      overall_band: 'low',
      evidence_strength: 'none',
      reviewed_source_count: 0,
      unreviewed_source_count: 0,
      scope_match_count: 0,
      high_trust_source_count: 0,
      medium_trust_source_count: 0,
      low_trust_source_count: 0,
      uncertainty_indicator: true,
      uncertainty_reasons: ['no_retrieved_memory'],
    },
    grounding,
    sources: [],
    selected_sources: [],
    retrieved_candidates: $json.retrieved_candidates ?? [],
    answer_mode: 'insufficient',
    conflict_flag: false,
    conflict_severity: null,
    conflict_details: [],
    claim_support_counts: [],
    most_supported_claim: null,
    most_recent_claim: null,
    entity_focus: $json.entity_focus ?? null,
    filtered_candidate_count: Number($json.filtered_candidate_count ?? 0),
    context_preview: '',
    session: {
      turn_count_before: $json.session_turn_count_before,
      history_used: $json.session_turn_count_before > 0,
      stored: false,
    },
    trace: withStage($json.trace, 'retrieval_empty', 'succeeded', {
      grounding_status: grounding.status,
      weak_grounding: grounding.weak_grounding,
      answer_mode: 'insufficient',
      conflict_flag: false,
    }),
  },
}];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO openbrain_chat_turns (
  session_id,
  role,
  message_text,
  project_slug,
  metadata_json
)
VALUES (
  $1::text,
  'user',
  $2::text,
  NULLIF($3::text, ''),
  $4::jsonb
)
RETURNING
  id,
  $1::text AS session_id,
  NULLIF($3::text, '') AS project_slug,
  $5::text AS answer_text,
  ($6::jsonb)::text AS assistant_metadata_json_text,
  ($7::jsonb)::text AS response_json_text;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.session_id, $json.query, $json.project_slug || '', JSON.stringify({ top_k: $json.top_k, request_source: 'assistant', trace: $json.trace || null, run_id: $json.trace?.run_id || null, correlation_id: $json.trace?.correlation_id || null }), $json.answer || $json.error?.message || 'CrispyBrain assistant request failed.', JSON.stringify({ ok: $json.ok, query: $json.query, retrieval: $json.retrieval, source_count: Array.isArray($json.sources) ? $json.sources.length : 0, error: $json.error || null, trace: $json.trace || null }), JSON.stringify($json)] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO openbrain_chat_turns (
  session_id,
  role,
  message_text,
  project_slug,
  metadata_json
)
VALUES (
  $1::text,
  'assistant',
  $2::text,
  NULLIF($3::text, ''),
  $4::jsonb
)
RETURNING id, ($5::jsonb)::text AS response_json_text;
